calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Xiao Miao Zeng was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Roger Wu and Zi Xian Wu.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Rebecca Wu was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petitions should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Names of the Minors to: Roger Zi Lian Wu and Benny Zi Xian Wu.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
